# Task Contract

**Format name:** Task file (`docs/tasks/<filename>`)
**Filename:** generated by `scripts/task-filename.sh <slug>` → `YYYYMMDD-HHMM-{slug}.json`
**Schema:** `contracts/task-schema.json` (schema_version: `"2"`)

## Producers

- `skills/to-tasks/` — primary producer, converts seeds/PRDs into task files; emits paired `code` + `reply` tasks from a PR-feedback seed's `provenance.items[]`
- `skills/to-e2e-tasks/` — produces task files focused on e2e test coverage
- `skills/debug/` — produces task files when fixes require multiple steps (non-inline only)
- `skills/improve-component/` — produces task files for component refactor work
- `skills/pr-code-review/` — produces task files after HITL finding-vetting checklist

## Consumers

- `skills/dispatch-tasks/` — partitions items by `task_type` and routes each branch to its runner
- `skills/build-code/` — executes `code` tasks (TDD loop), updates status, records `pr`/`commit`
- `skills/run-task-followups/` — walks through follow_ups interactively
- `skills/tasks-to-linear/` — syncs tasks to Linear, writes back `linear_url`
- `skills/relay/` — consumes `reply` tasks, citing the blocking code task's `commit` (copy-only until built)

## Optional fields

- `browser_verify`: present only for UI tasks requiring post-TDD browser verification
- `linear_url`: written back by tasks-to-linear after syncing; null until then
- `commit`: fixing commit SHA recorded by build-code at end-of-run push; cited by `reply` tasks
- `reply_body` / `reply_url` / `thread_id` / `thread_id_type`: present only on `reply` tasks (written by pr-revise)

## Schema file

[task-schema.json](task-schema.json)
